Title: Provides dormitory authority financing for construction of buildings to be used as a school for Yeshiva Ohr Yoseph
Summary: Provides dormitory authority financing for construction of buildings to be used as a school for Yeshiva Ohr Yoseph.
ActClause: AN ACT to amend the public authorities law, in relation to providing for the financing and construction of capital facilities for Yeshiva Ohr Yoseph
